emergency_definition: no heat when it's under 40 degrees outside
non_emergency_routing_rules: take a message - name, number, and what it's about

call_transfer_rules.if_no_answer: take their info and tell them we'll have our estimator, Paula, call them back

integration_constraints: do not create sprinkler jobs in ServiceTrade
do not create gas line estimates in ServiceTrade
after_hours_flow_summary: Emergency calls are routed to Mike, non-emergency calls are messaged and returned the next morning
special_rules: escalate to Mike directly if caller is upset or threatening
notes: Ace Plumbing and HVAC handles residential plumbing and HVAC work, with specific emergency and non-emergency call handling rules

v1_to_v2_changes.emergency_definition: Added 'gas smell' to emergency definition list
v1_to_v2_changes.integration_constraints: Added constraint to never create gas line estimates in ServiceTrade

greeting_update: Ace Plumbing and HVAC, serving Austin since 1998
